summary: Structure gate can approve. The 15m rollup fixes the cadence/lookback mismatch at the correct rule seam, while the RHS guard preserves silence during telemetry loss. The RED harness and frozen fixtures are byte-identical through the fix, characterization was not weakened, scope is contained, and no material coupling blocks the follow-ups.
next_steps: Proceed to verification and commit the machine-owned GREEN record with green.sha before the release gate.
